login.title: Roamer's Ledger
login.subtitle: Dein persönlicher Reiseplaner
login.description: Melde dich an, um deine Reisen weiter zu planen
login.termsPrefix: Mit dem Fortfahren stimmst du unseren

landing.heroSubtitle: Reiseplan, Karte, Ausgaben, Reisnotizen und mehr an einem Ort
landing.heroBody: Ein Projekt aus persönlichem Interesse. Plane die Route, halte den Zeitplan lesbar, organisiere Unterkünfte und Transport, arbeite mit Freunden zusammen, erhalte Vorschläge und mehr.
landing.heroFree: Alles, was du in einer kostenpflichtigen Reiseplaner-App findest, kannst du hier KOSTENLOS erledigen.
landing.sectionTitle: Plane deine Reisen mit Freunden und verfolge deine Ausgaben an einem Ort.
landing.featureItineraryTitle: Sieh deinen Reiseplan und die Karte zusammen
landing.featureItineraryCopy: Ordne jeden Stopp auf einer echten Route an, behalte die Tagesreihenfolge im Blick und verstehe die Reise auf einen Blick, statt zwischen Notizen und Karten-Tabs zu wechseln.
landing.featureRouteCopy: Sieh die Reise als Zeitachse und Karte, berechne Bewegungen zwischen Stopps und halte den Tagesablauf klar, während sich der Reiseplan weiterentwickelt.
landing.featureLogisticsTitle: Behalte Transport, Unterkünfte, Notizen und Zeiten in einem Plan
landing.featureLogisticsCopy: Flüge, Hotels, Routendetails, Dokumente und tägliche Stopps gehören in dieselbe Reise, damit der Plan vom ersten Entwurf bis zum Reisetag lesbar bleibt.
landing.featureCollaborateTitle: Plant gemeinsam und bleibt alle auf dem gleichen Stand
landing.featureCollaborateCopy: Teile die Reise, arbeite mit Freunden zusammen und halte den Plan für alle lesbar, statt Details über verschiedene Chats zu verstreuen.
landing.featureExpenseTitle: Behalte Ausgaben im Blick, ohne den Reisekontext zu verlieren
landing.featureExpenseCopy: Halte Ausgaben direkt neben dem Reiseplan, damit Transport, Unterkünfte, gemeinsame Kosten und Planung im selben Arbeitsbereich verbunden bleiben.

home.heroBody: Öffne dein Journal erneut, finde deine letzten Routen und mache mit der nächsten Reise weiter.
home.emptyBodySuffix: um deine erste Reise zu erstellen

tripCreate.joinHelp: Gib einen Code ein, um Zugriff anzufragen. Das Erstellen-Formular wird währenddessen deaktiviert.
tripCreate.descriptionPlaceholder: Worum geht es bei dieser Reise?

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.description: This page explains, in plain language, what data the app uses so the planner can work. Last updated: March 21, 2026.
privacyPage.sectionStorageBody: Roamer's Ledger stores the trip information you create, such as trip names, itinerary items, transport, stays, checklist items, expenses, and account-linked settings needed to run the planner.
privacyPage.sectionAccountBody: When you sign in, the app receives basic account information from the authentication provider, such as your name, email address, and profile image, so your account and trip sharing features can work.
privacyPage.sectionLocationBody: When you search for places, routes, or map suggestions, the app sends those requests to third-party mapping providers such as Google Maps Platform and Geoapify. Those providers may process request data according to their own policies.
privacyPage.sectionPaymentsBody: If you subscribe or donate, payment processing is handled by Stripe. Roamer's Ledger does not store full card details on its own servers.
privacyPage.sectionOfflineBody: If you export trip content or save copies for offline use on your device, those copies are under your control on that device and may remain available until you delete them.
privacyPage.sectionSharingBody: If you share a trip or invite collaborators, the people you add may be able to view and interact with the trip data you share with them, depending on their access level.
privacyPage.sectionContactBody: For privacy questions, use the support link in the footer to contact the project owner.

notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist, or you may not have access to it.

orders.body: View completed Stripe payments recorded for your account, including upgrade invoices and donations.

upgrade.title: Roamer's Ledger Pro
upgrade.body1: This is a personal project, and the APIs behind maps, route calculation, and billing are not free to run.
upgrade.body2: Unlock the full Roamer's Ledger experience.
upgrade.supportPrompt: Already subscribed? Send me an email.

donate.title: Support Roamer's Ledger
donate.body1: This is a personal project, and the APIs behind maps, route calculation, and suggestions are not free to run.
donate.body2: Your contribution helps keep Roamer's Ledger free and growing. Every bit counts.
donate.successBody: Your generosity means the world to us and helps us keep improving Roamer's Ledger.
donate.canceledBody: No worries — you can donate any time.

tripDetail.stayBroadenSearch: Not found? Search all place types

tripDetail.flightNumberFormatPrefix: Flight number format should look like
tripDetail.archiveTripHint: Hides it from the active list. Stops and expenses are locked.
tripDetail.restoreTripHint: Move it back to the active list.

tripDetail.deleteTripBodySuffix: and all its stops and expenses. This cannot be undone.

signupGate.title: Create an account to unlock this
signupGate.description: Sign up to keep your draft, unlock route planning, stays, transport, documents, expenses, and collaboration.

expense.sharedHelp: Shared expenses are split equally among all trip members.
expense.personalHelp: Personal expenses only count toward your own total.
expense.myTotalHint: Personal + my share of group expenses
expense.equalSplitNote: Based on equal split of shared expenses (CAD only)

checklist.title: Checklist

checklist.emptyBody: Add your first checklist item for this trip.

notificationsPage.title: Notifications
notificationsPage.subtitle: Pending join requests for your trips

itinerary-planner.title: Build a clear travel itinerary without juggling notes and map tabs
itinerary-planner.description: Plan a trip itinerary with dated stops, stays, map context, and a readable travel timeline.
itinerary-planner.intro: Roamer's Ledger gives you one itinerary view that stays readable as the trip grows. Add stops, revisit places on different days, keep unscheduled ideas nearby, and switch between list and map without losing the day sequence.
bullets: Keep dated and unscheduled stops in one planner.
Switch between map view and list view without losing context.
Share a readable trip schedule instead of scattered notes.

route-planner.title: Plan routes between stops while keeping the day sequence visible
route-planner.description: Use a trip route planner that keeps stops, transport, and the itinerary timeline connected.
route-planner.intro: The route view is built around the trip, not around isolated point-to-point searches. You can see how movement fits inside each day, compare route modes, and keep transport decisions attached to the plan that people will actually follow.
bullets: Calculate movement between itinerary stops inside the same planner.
Keep transport and stay details in context with the route.
Use the trip map as a working route surface, not just a reference map.

group-trip-planning.title: Plan together and keep everyone on the same page
group-trip-planning.description: Collaborate on group trip plans with one shared itinerary, map, and trip schedule.
group-trip-planning.intro: Roamer's Ledger is designed for shared planning. Invite collaborators, keep one version of the itinerary, and make the trip understandable for everyone without splitting updates across group chats and screenshots.
bullets: Share the same trip instead of maintaining multiple copies.
Keep transport, stays, and the route in one shared workspace.
Make the final plan easier for everyone to follow.

travel-expense-tracker.title: Track travel expenses without losing the trip context
travel-expense-tracker.description: Track shared and personal travel expenses inside the same trip workspace.
travel-expense-tracker.intro: Expenses make more sense when they live next to the itinerary. Keep personal and shared costs tied to the same trip, so transport, accommodation, and group spending stay connected to the actual plan.
bullets: Separate personal and shared spending clearly.
Keep expense tracking inside the trip instead of another spreadsheet.
Review costs alongside the route, stays, and day plan.

trip-pdf-export.title: Save your itinerary as a clean trip PDF for offline reference
trip-pdf-export.description: Export a phone-friendly trip itinerary PDF with stops, routes, and map links.
trip-pdf-export.intro: When you need a stable copy of the plan, export the itinerary as a compact PDF. The printable trip view keeps stops, route summaries, stays, and map links in one shareable offline-friendly document.
bullets: Generate a narrow itinerary PDF that reads well on a phone.
Keep route summaries and map links in the exported plan.
Share a stable read-only version of the trip when needed.

planner.archivedNotice: Diese Reise ist archiviert. Hinzufügen und Löschen sind deaktiviert.
planner.pickPointHelp: Wähle einen Punkt auf der Karte oder im Reiseplan und suche dann nach Vorschlägen.

planner.mapsNotConfigured: Google Maps ist nicht konfiguriert. Füge NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY hinzu, um die Ortssuche zu verwenden.

planner.saveAsPdfHint: Nutze die Browser-Option Zum PDF speichern.

planner.calculateDialogBody: Bitte stelle sicher, dass alle Stopps und Zeiten final sind. Die Reisezeiten werden zwischen aufeinanderfolgenden Stopps desselben Tages berechnet.
planner.signupToCalculateTitle: Registriere dich, um Routen zu berechnen
planner.signupToCalculateDescription: Erstelle ein Konto, um Routen- und Reisezeitberechnung für deine Reise freizuschalten.
